/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libbooster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/booster_msgs/msg/detail/binary_data__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/booster_msgs/msg/detail/rpc_req_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/booster_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/booster_msgs/msg/detail/rpc_resp_msg__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
